## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing APIs)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Architecture Compliance

<!-- All contributions must comply with the architecture specifications -->

- [ ] Follows SPEC-001 (Repository Architecture)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-002 (Data Model)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-003 (Rule Engine)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-004 (Extraction Framework)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-005 (Risk Model)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-006 (Terminal UX)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-007 (Plugin SDK)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-008 (Testing & Security)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-009 (Implementation Blueprint)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-010 (Architecture Constitution)
- [ ] Follows SPEC-011 (AI Explanation Layer)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Build passes (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] No circular dependencies introduced (`pnpm circular`)
- [ ] Documentation has been updated
- [ ] Changeset has been added (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Public APIs are preserved (no breaking changes unless documented)
